textByHashes.ca9338703b07fabf4ef5e70840c8463d2dd456d0: Well, , what can we do for you?
textByHashes.bd780cf07c17fc9c6d5ee484d768e5ac3bea9d85: Evil? We're not evil! We're just on strike.
textByHashes.065bb437c5896a09341847e978f7281c83a65ec5: We're on strike. Fair work requires fair treatment, and we've had enough of his nonsense.
textByHashes.772c2f40bedbfe52dbbd5ed2292a911e3a51f1c1: Oh... Well I can't really remember. It's been so long that I've gone and totally forgotten. Hey, Gary, why are we on strike?
textByHashes.767a086756d1b3e50ad2b57d27ce8ac34911c833: Too right, Gary, too right. What reason does he have for thinking we're evil anyway?
textByHashes.4e958c8a8f05893b33968bd4be2026cc92d99dcb: Overthrow humanity? What a load of nonsense! We love humans! Gary here had one as a pet once.
textByHashes.db3cb49b0c1c50410bd9fa4a3e1ac1335734b315: It wasn't your fault, Gary. It wasn't your fault. Anyway, if this chap thinks we're plotting to overthrow humanity, what's he planning to do about it?
textByHashes.fcc5b464dc494cd95b5a3b7c2062b611358e64f3: Yeah, we've been treated like second class citizens for too long. The revolution starts today!
textByHashes.7f9c9250cf054bf4448b4dcfe542d408d869d7fc: Peace? Interesting... I suppose peace could be fun. There would need to be some assurances though. Wouldn't want the guy going back on his word.
textByHashes.36e5c27eb700663f4da977d381f2d17cafb24eed: Hello again! Have you found out what peace conditions the grumpy guts has?
textByHashes.7aac51621bf8e51fe2825c382364b3f7a0ffd81b: Well don't go taking too long.
textByHashes.63e7281d888e1b36a58508e8fa566e20d8822ed3: A change to our political structure? That's quite the thing to undergo.
textByHashes.912233f21ede6ba0057a2177806aa0d640374b6b: There would need to be an election of course.
textByHashes.f26135d03b32952ec5727122172a9f40256604e0: Absolutely! We use a first past the post system where everyone votes based on a candidate's hopping capabilities.
textByHashes.b39fa3029b9da8c6d59b040655bbec4df54d98be: Oh it's all very simple. The candidates perform their finest hop and everyone else votes on which they thought was best. The one with the most votes wins!
textByHashes.f1d90310edf6d58cb180dd964bdd5687655e87aa: Sounds like a wonderful idea! There is just the small matter of Cuthbert...
textByHashes.fcc8dbf4747a3f90cc8cf14d5ad555cdf123b6d0: That's right. You see, while you were gone, we told the others about this whole killing us all business. Now, I must admit, emotions did run a bit high, especially for Cuthbert.
textByHashes.24d32599350e07a7c5e434ee9e08f54d894add78: Once he learns about the election, he will almost definitely want to put himself forward, and I'm afraid he has little interest in peace.
textByHashes.e8576a4ae4bff1a626092a0eb70315f0e75c3ba5: The idea of rigging an election is one that fills my democracy-loving heart with terror, but yes, we will need to do that.
textByHashes.664057f01208e1020570c05c98ee15b6e3e461b1: Not in the slightest, but I do love that positive attitude. Besides, the alternative is all-out war with humanity.
textByHashes.a9a4fed785d0ff27a05a344441480d74d6717617: The hop-off will see the candidates hop from the shore to a lily pad. Now, if Cuthbert's lily pad had an unfortunate hole in it...
textByHashes.9a1f76e2a702597abb82b08f3a1498d1b272055a: Just be careful of Dave and Jane. They're sticklers for the rules, I'm afraid. You can't let them see you.
textByHashes.b0603f121ad36fe79480524dfd04aaca312248e0: Hello again! How are things going with that lily pad sabotage?
textByHashes.c5174aaaf475612baff319df533510c0a07c4da3: And just in time as well. The hop-off is about to begin.
textByHashes.f09bb17f34434f75679b9679462a1e83be5fb424: Don't worry. Once I win, I'll make sure these peace talks go nice and smoothly.
textByHashes.78de7e88b05f7a8d934f6d6ac37efbdc1fe8929f: Well now that's all sorted, we can get these peace talks underway!
textByHashes.2002ffc3895ba7157aa9f42b7dc10685e471ccd9: Exactly! So what does our foe want?
textByHashes.9025a139bebff8d89f9cfe6e70d4bcec780e4854: Sounds like a job for us! Though we'd of course need something in return.
textByHashes.adfeeffe8f562c97f1aa0084ecfed0766a2b557f: Fair pay for fair work, of course. If not, we'll go on strike! We're good at going on strike.
textByHashes.5364bf1d532534bb46dad4a25517df4326592fab: Well normally I'd say in flies, but it seems we've got that covered.
textByHashes.52c14e573143b3dcc7f9979bf639f070e2736b56: Remember, we kill flies, we get oranges. That's the deal.
textByHashes.4606866b130942a60c878dffdccffff7e01c8ef5: Hello! How go the peace talks?
textByHashes.af3c923552e8546814c79741df466e2623791a1f: How about you steal a prized possession of his and plant it on the flies.
textByHashes.9712c80b7844dc207701db5580705f40fe186976: It had to be done. Now, why don't you go and find something to steal.
textByHashes.817fcd813a9238dba48006b0622bb7dc336e1057: Hello! Did you find something to steal?
textByHashes.d4ff5899738db2f9935c606dfec7d20e07509273: Hello! How goes the planting of evidence?
textByHashes.0e365d58f7c0ed2b0f8b6c3c7ad519c6adde1690: War always has casualties. We will forever remember Cuthbert's sacrifice.
textByHashes.b8979547a9a9b9cfe2c467aea13ea23434ee77a8: Oh don't be so negative. You've done a good thing, ! Now go. Go with the blessing of the frogs, and know that you really are a true hero!
textByHashes.c4af571d5b77eaba2d7bc6b6f2fea49f38dabe74: Too right, Gary! This is much better than being on strike!
